prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为5343→5887→6528→7651→8325，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约2982名，年均后移约596名；2025年基准位次约83 25名，较2024年后移674名，后移速度有所加快；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年90人、2022年94人、2023年98人、2024年97人、2025年105人、2026年（ §7）115人；2026年较2025年扩招10人（约+9.5%），扩招幅度为近年最大，按供需弹性原理将推高录取位次数字（竞争加剧）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软 科中国大学排名2026年约第82名，近年排名稳定在82–84区间，属于中上层次211院校；2025年高考周期声誉偏正面（新闻传播学获评A++等级），抖音热度总排 名第11（高热），曝光度较高；但2026年高考周期声誉转为偏负面（涉及宿舍火灾、校园安全管理事件），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制。历史投档异常记录中未出现该 校断档信号；新闻传播学为A+学科（全国顶尖），覆盖该校新闻学、传播学、网络与新媒体、广播电视学、广告学等核心招生专业，学科竞争力突出，对相关方 向考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 新闻传播学大类在2023年专业热度分析中被评为“明显劝退”，社会舆论对就业前景存在疑虑；但计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业持续高热推荐，该校相关工科专业（数字媒体技术、人工智能、计算机等）受益于整体热度。北京市 2026年高考报名总人数约84,900人，较2025年65,434人增长约29.7%，考生规模大幅增加将加剧整体竞争；中国传媒大学位于北京市，为本市高校，在京招生计划占比较高（2025年105人），本地考生报考意愿通常较强；2026年扩招10人部分缓解本地竞争压力，但考生总数增幅远 超扩招幅度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（年均约596名）、2026年扩招10人（+9.5%）按供需弹性推高位次、北京市考生总数大幅增长29.7%加剧竞争，以及202 6年声誉偏负面和新闻传播学专业劝退舆论的有限抑制作用，在2025年基准8325名基础上，预测2026年最低录取位次约8851名，波动区间8351–9351名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约8851名，区间8351–9351名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档工科专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如8300以内）可重点冲击传播学 、人工智能实验班等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（如9300左右）建议优先考虑三档工科专业（通信工程、计算机等），兼顾二档中的数字媒体技术、广告学等。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Beijing were 5343 → 5887 → 6528 → 7651 → 8325, showing a continuous backward trend. Over the past 5 years, the cumulative backward shift is approximately 2982 places, with an average annual shift of about 596 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 8325, a backward shift of 674 places compared to 2024, indicating an accelerated pace. The enrollment plan for this university in Beijing's comprehensive subjects: 90 in 2021, 94 in 2022, 98 in 2023, 97 in 2024, 105 in 2025, and 115 in 2026 (§7). Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an expansion of 10 students (approximately +9.5%), the largest expansion in recent years. According to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, this will push the admission ranking number higher (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 82–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 institutions. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++), with a total Douyin popularity ranking of 11th (high heat) and high exposure. However, in the 2026 cycle, the reputation turned negative (involving dormitory fires and campus safety management incidents), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. No signs of a cutoff gap were found in historical admission anomaly records. Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (top in the country), covering core enrollment majors such as Journalism, Communication, Network and New Media, Radio and Television, and Advertising, with outstanding disciplinary competitiveness and strong appeal to candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Journalism and Communication major category was rated as 'clearly discouraged' in the 2023 major popularity analysis, with social opinion expressing doubts about employment prospects. However, computer-related, electronic information/communication majors continue to be highly recommended, and the university's related engineering majors (Digital Media Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, etc.) benefit from overall popularity. The total number of registered candidates for the 2026 Beijing college entrance examination is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025. The significant increase in candidate numbers will intensify overall competition. Communication University of China is located in Beijing, a local university, with a relatively high proportion of enrollment plans in Beijing (105 in 2025). Local candidates usually have a strong willingness to apply. The expansion of 10 students in 2026 partially alleviates local competition pressure, but the total increase in candidates far exceeds the expansion magnitude.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings (average annual shift of about 596 places), the 2026 expansion of 10 students (+9.5%) pushing the ranking higher according to supply-demand elasticity, the significant 29.7% increase in the total number of Beijing candidates intensifying competition, and the limited suppressive effects of the negative reputation in 2026 and the discouraged opinion on Journalism and Communication majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 8325, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 8851, with a fluctuation range of 8351–9351.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 8851, range 8351–9351. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 engineering majors as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8300), focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Communication Studies and the Artificial Intelligence Experimental Class. For rankings close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 9300), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 engineering majors (Communication Engineering, Computer Science, etc.), while also considering Tier 2 majors like Digital Media Technology and Advertising.
